name: merv
description: Lean Codex research-state workflow with project-local MCP context, resources, reviews, and cloud SSH sandboxes.

interface.shortDescription: Project-scoped claims, experiments, resources, reviews, and cloud sandboxes
interface.longDescription: A research-state plug-in where Codex operates through skills and a checkout-local MCP proxy. A brain running on localhost or as a hosted service owns durable records, workflow policy, review gates, pinned submissions, and cloud sandbox lifecycle; the proxy owns checkout IO, folder links, and explicit output pulls. Agents use project(action="current") for folder context, pull retained sandbox outputs with sandbox.pull_outputs, and register repo artifacts with resource.register.
defaultPrompt: Use Merv. Start with project(action="current"), then workflow.status_and_next.
Use Merv to run this experiment in a sandbox, pull selected retained outputs with sandbox.pull_outputs, and register the local result files.
Use Merv to register and associate the relevant resources, review the experiment, and update claims.
